description: A soak-test event. Loaded by both the source-soak connector (as its discovered document schema) and capture/flow.yaml (as every events collection's schema), so the wire contract has a single source of truth.

id.description: Account identity; an integer drawn from [key_begin, key_begin + idRange) of the producing capture shard's owned key range.

seq.description: Per-id, gap-less, monotonic sequence number. With key [/id, /seq] every (id, seq) is unique, so the collection is an append-only log and a direct exactly-once probe.

set.description: A set operation over members a..h. Exactly one of add/remove/intersect is present; each is a sorted, de-duplicated array. Reduced downstream with the `set` strategy.

balanceDelta.description: Signed amount: one leg of a matched transfer pair (negative on the sender, positive on the receiver). Reduced downstream with `sum`.

transfer.description: The transfer this document is a leg of. Identical on both legs; present for correlation and debugging.

oracle.description: The connector's authoritative post-event truth for THIS id, derived from state persisted across sessions. Downstream reductions of an id's events must converge to these values.

set.description: Expected sorted membership of /id after this event.

balance.description: Expected balance of /id after this event.
